title: Lab 47: Per-User Password Aging
description: Adjust password aging for an existing user account with chage

tasks: Create user aging47 with password redhat if it does not already exist.
Configure aging47 with a maximum password age of 30 days, a minimum age of 2 days, and a warning period of 7 days.
Force aging47 to change the password at the next login.
hints: Use chage, not manual edits to /etc/shadow.
